text: As I first approach the glass doors, I feel a sense of anticipation and curiosity, the transparency creating both a barrier and an invitation. Crossing into the vibrant exhibition space, surrounded by colorful displays and illuminated text, I am filled with excitement and wonder. The air is alive with the energy of innovation and possibility; it inspires me to reflect on human creativity and the perpetual drive to explore and understand. Here, I feel as though I am on the threshold of discovery, eager to question and to learn.
